main.description: Register a localhost URL where the AppView will POST notifications for the authenticated caller as they are indexed. If `since` is non-null, the AppView also replays every notification it has stored for this caller with `indexedAt > since` (oldest first) before returning. Re-registration overwrites the prior URL. Spec: specs/notification-push.md.

url.description: Where to POST notifications. Must be of the form http://127.0.0.1:<port>/... (localhost only).

since.description: ISO timestamp. If provided, the AppView replays every notification for this caller with indexedAt > since before returning. Use the caller's last-seen-notification cursor on respawn; null on first registration.
